title: Yantai, Shandong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Yantai, Shandong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Yantai is a city in Shandong with a population of 7,102,000. A coastal city in Shandong known for its wine regions, French colonial heritage, and beautiful beaches on the Bohai Sea.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
